evidence_boundary: The draft can be reviewed as a system-and-benchmark proposal with T0 fixture evidence, but it is not upload-ready as a final empirical paper until mobile-tier and baseline evidence are attached.

gates.name: Manuscript source and compiled PDF exist
gates.rationale: The anonymous ICLR-style draft has LaTeX source and a compiled PDF.
next_actions: Recompile after every text or bibliography change.

gates.name: Claims are mapped to evidence boundaries
gates.rationale: T0 fixture evidence is separated from real mobile and baseline claims.
next_actions: Keep new claims tied to concrete artifacts before adding them to the paper.

gates.name: Core positioning claim is evidence-bounded
gates.rationale: The paper frames mobile AI coding as a harness control plane rather than a full mobile IDE or a general phone-use benchmark.
next_actions: Regenerate the core claim readiness report after changing the abstract, introduction, motivation, scope or related-work positioning.

gates.name: Mobile-tier results are not over-claimed
gates.rationale: Android/iOS readiness is recorded, but no T2/T3/T4 result is claimed.
next_actions: Run Android real-device subset.
Run Mac iOS simulator subset.
Attach screenshots, logs, traces, and device metadata.

gates.name: Mobile-tier evidence capture pack is ready
gates.rationale: Android T2 and iOS T3 task-level evidence templates are generated but not counted as results.
next_actions: Fill the templates only during real Android or Mac iOS simulator collection.

gates.name: Verifier contracts cover current task banks
gates.rationale: All verifier ids referenced by the current v0/v1/v2 task banks are covered by machine-readable verifier contracts.
next_actions: Regenerate the verifier contract readiness report after adding task categories, verifier ids, or verifier evidence requirements.

gates.name: Baseline comparison remains protocol-only
gates.rationale: The baseline pilot pack is ready for execution but not ready for counted results.
next_actions: Execute the pilot with locked model settings.
Attach transcripts, verifier outputs, artifacts, and human-intervention records.

gates.name: Anonymous supplement boundary is defined
gates.rationale: The boundary document defines included artifacts, repo-compatible supplement layout, excluded private materials, and scan rules.
next_actions: Regenerate the supplement zip after real mobile runs, baseline runs, citation changes, and this readiness report.

gates.name: Reviewer manifest evidence labels are machine-gated
gates.rationale: The supplement staging script fails if README_SUPPLEMENT.md loses its claim map, evidence labels, or mobile-result boundary.
next_actions: Keep reviewer-facing labels synchronized with new evidence states before regenerating the supplement.

gates.name: Venue, template, and authorship remain draft
gates.rationale: The draft still needs venue/year confirmation, official template confirmation, and author OpenReview checks.
next_actions: Confirm target venue/year and official template.
Confirm author OpenReview profiles before upload.

gates.name: Related-work bibliography metadata is verified
gates.rationale: The current cited related-work entries have source URLs, eprint metadata where available, and no author placeholders.
next_actions: Regenerate the bibliography readiness report after adding, removing, or replacing citations.

gates.name: Threats to validity are tracked
gates.rationale: Construct, internal, external, baseline, privacy and submission threats are explicit and tied to open requirements.
next_actions: Regenerate the threats matrix after changing claims, evidence levels, baselines, mobile collection or submission metadata.

gates.name: Evaluation protocol is machine-checkable
gates.rationale: E1-E5 are tied to task sets, current evidence artifacts and non-counted open requirements.
next_actions: Regenerate the evaluation protocol readiness report after changing E1-E5, task subsets, mobile collection or baseline protocols.

gates.name: Method presentation is reviewable
gates.rationale: The draft has machine-checked visuals, algorithms, module interfaces, formulas and evidence-boundary language.
next_actions: Regenerate the method presentation readiness report after changing system, benchmark, verifier, evaluation or limitation sections.

gates.name: Draft reproducibility checklist is available
gates.rationale: The draft command matrix maps reproducible commands to expected artifacts while keeping full empirical reproduction open.
next_actions: Regenerate the reproducibility checklist after changing scripts, output artifacts, paper compilation, supplement staging, or validation commands.

gates.name: Compiled PDF page boundary is checked
gates.rationale: The compiled draft records total PDF pages, the ethics page and the References start page, and keeps the main text within the current page limit.
next_actions: Regenerate the page-limit readiness report after paper text, bibliography, style-file or template changes.
